creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
libtool adds -nostdlib for linking, which causes the -pthread arg to be discarded. This patch fixes that.

Because libtool is used by so many ports, an exp-run is requested.

Port maintainer (autotools@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: SVN)
